Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Pieter Coetze fails to add to Team South’s medal tally

Pieter Coetze failed to add to Team South’s medal tally at the Paris Olympics 2024 on Thursday night. Here’s what happened …

Pieter Coetzefailed to add to Team South’s medal tally at theParis Olympics 2024on Thursday night.

Enjoy the Paris Olympic Games 2024 experience at your favourite ATKV Resort!

Coetze finished a disappointing seventh in the men’s 200m backstroke.

The 20-year-old Pretoria-born star stopped the clock in a time of 1:55:60.

Hungary’sHubert Kostook the gold medal.
